CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2011 Continued To Dec-30-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Request For Punitive Damages From The Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mary Barnes, Esq., of The Dolan Law Firm, 415-421-2800, for Plaintiff and opposing party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL BEAUTY TRADE USA INC.'S Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Request For Punitive Damages From The Amended Complaint is Denied. The amended complaint pleads sufficient facts to support a request for exemplary damages. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR 7077

MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Request For Punitive Damages From The Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-01-2011 Continued To Nov-07-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL BEAUTY TRADE USA INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Vanessa K. Wills, Esq. of Dolan Law Firm 421-2800 for pltfs & opposing parties; Isaac T. Bacher, Esq. of Muro & Lampe, Inc. 916/817-6300 for deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 11/07/11. Defendant to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Continued To Nov-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL BEAUTY TRADE USA INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES.

APPEARANCES: Vanessa K. Wills, Esq. of Dolan Law Firm 421-2800 for pltfs & opposing parties; Veronica J. Philipp, Esq. of Muro & Lampe, Inc. 916/817-6300 for deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CLAIM. In addition, the Court stated plaintiff has 20 days from notice of entry of order to file its amended complaint. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Continued To Jul-15-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Continued to July 15, 2011.
